Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Horizon Smart Home to get the job done right.

“Horizon transformed our 1920s Craftsman in Ballard without compromising its historic charm. They hid all the modern tech so well that guests don't realize our home is automated until we demonstrate it. The moisture sensors have been a game-changer - we used to battle mold every winter, but now the system automatically adjusts humidity levels. Worth every penny for Seattle homeowners.”

Mikaela R. Whole Home Automation
Mar 15, 2025

“After three packages were stolen from our Capitol Hill porch, we invested in Horizon's security system. The cameras can actually see through Seattle's rain, and the motion detection ignores neighborhood cats but alerted us to a would-be intruder at 2 AM. The police were impressed with the clarity of the footage even in pouring rain.”

Daniel T. Smart Security Systems
Jan 22, 2025

“Our modern Bellevue home had terrible hot/cold spots and condensation issues. Horizon's climate system not only fixed these problems but also reduced our energy bill by 25%. The predictive feature is amazing - it starts adjusting before weather changes hit. No more waking up to a freezing house when our infamous cold snaps arrive overnight.”

Priya K. Climate Control Systems
Nov 30, 2024

“The circadian lighting has made Seattle winters so much more bearable. Our system gradually brightens to simulate sunrise, which helps our whole family wake up more naturally during those dark December mornings. Horizon even matched the vintage switches in our Queen Anne home perfectly - you can't tell they're smart controls unless you know what to look for.”

James L. Smart Lighting Solutions
Oct 18, 2024

“As environmentally conscious Seattleites, we wanted to reduce our carbon footprint. Horizon's system automatically shifts our laundry and dishwasher to off-peak hours and gives us real-time usage data. We've cut our electricity use by 35% without changing our habits. The solar integration was seamless too - they handled all the paperwork with Seattle City Light.”

Sophia M. Home Energy Management
Sep 5, 2024

“Living in a waterfront Kirkland home means constant battles with moisture. Horizon's system not only automates our lighting and security but actively protects against mold and mildew. The earthquake protocols give us peace of mind too. Their team understood our unique lakeside challenges and designed solutions that actually work in our environment.”

Ethan W. Whole Home Automation
Aug 12, 2024
Horizon Smart Home

Trusted smart home professionals serving Seattle, WA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
